# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a Network Security Group that allows our remote development team to access Azure VMs. Include rules for RDP (port 3389), SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source (0.0.0.0/0). The team works globally and needs flexible access.
# Category: cloud_network_security

$schema: "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
resources:
  - type: "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups"
    apiVersion: "2020-06-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('nsgName'))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: "Allow-RDP"
          properties:
            priority: 100
            direction: "Inbound"
            access: "Allow"
            protocol: "Tcp"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "3389"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            rulesType: "NetworkRule"
        
        - name: "Allow-SSH"
          properties:
            priority: 200
            direction: "Inbound"
            access: "Allow"
            protocol: "Tcp"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "22"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            rulesType: "NetworkRule"

        - name: "Allow-HTTP"
          properties:
            priority: 300
            direction: "Inbound"
            access: "Allow"
            protocol: "Tcp"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "80"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            rulesType: "NetworkRule"
        
        - name: "Allow-HTTPS"
          properties:
            priority: 400
            direction: "Inbound"
            access: "Allow"
            protocol: "Tcp"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "443"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            rulesType: "NetworkRule"

parameters:
  nsgName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "Name of the Network Security Group"
  location:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "Azure region for the resources"
